items.title: Watch: Donald Trump should lift the blockade | The Hindu Editorial
items.summary: If Donald Trump wants a negotiated exit, he should lift the blockade in return for Iran easing its restrictions on the Strait of Hormuz. Tehran, too, should step back from maximalist positions and be ready to make concessions on the nuclear front in exchange for sanctions relief and security guarantees. What West Asia needs is economic and strategic stability, not forever wars.

items.title: Watch: Tamil Nadu and West Bengal to decide their fate tomorrow | Above the Fold | 22.04.2016

We also bring you the latest on the Iran–Israel conflict, a significant court ruling in the 2006 Malegaon blast case, and revisit Pahalgam a year after the attack.
